articles.description: Mohamed Salah will leave Liverpool as an all-time great and iconic Premier League figure, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Mohamed Salah will leave Liverpool as all-time great & iconic Premier League figure

articles.description: BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty asks what Spurs should do next with uncertainty surrounding the future of interim head coach Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Stick with Tudor or go for De Zerbi, Mason, Redknapp or another - where do Spurs go next?

articles.description: Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah announces he will leave the club at the end of the season.
articles.title: Mohamed Salah: Liverpool forward to leave at end of season

articles.description: Jonny Bairstow criticises the England set-up, suggesting they need to bring "the care back in the game".
articles.title: Jonny Bairstow criticises "care" shown by England regime under Brendon McCullum and Rob Key

articles.description: Watch and follow live coverage as Arsenal host Chelsea in the first leg of their Women's Champions League quarter-final.
articles.title: UEFA Women's Champions League LIVE: Arsenal vs Chelsea in quarter-finals - stream, radio, updates, stats

articles.description: Tom English speaks to those who returned Scotland to the men's World Cup finals  for the first time since 1998 about the epic win over Denmark.
articles.title: Fifa World Cup: The night Scotland beat Denmark - told by those who made it happen

articles.description: Former France forward Antoine Griezmann will join MLS side Orlando City from Atletico Madrid this summer.
articles.title: Antoine Griezmann: Atletico Madrid legend to join MLS side Orlando City

articles.description: Manchester United are still aiming to have their new stadium built and ready to host the 2035 Women's World Cup final.
articles.title: Man Utd new stadium: Plans in place to build venue in time to host 2035 Women's World Cup final

articles.title: F1 Q&A: Verstappen and Red Bull, Newey and Aston Martin, Audi, Cadillac and F1's sustainable fuel

articles.description: Tottenham significantly outran Nottingham Forest on Sunday but still ended up losing 3-0, so does running more make a difference?
articles.title: Premier League: Does running more actually make a difference?
